image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if I told you fake surgery can actually ease pain?
Context visual: In clinical trials, sham procedures are showing surprising results.
Escalation visual: Patients experiencing real symptom changes—just from believing they had surgery.
Evidence visual: This ‘placebo effect’ reveals how powerful our expectations can be.
Payoff visual: Understanding this could reshape how we approach pain management.
Cta visual: Curious about the mind-body connection? Like and follow for more insights!
